issues.description: Missing condition for total Life check. Card text states 'If you and your opponent have a total of 5 or more Life cards' but DSL only checks HasRestingDon. Requires additional condition checking combined Life totals.
Target scope incomplete. Should specify maxCost applies only when condition is met; current structure doesn't properly gate the K.O. action on the life total check.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Main] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards: If you and your opponent have a total of 5 or more Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 5 or less.
[Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader gains +3000 power during this battle.
